title: After Didi's Heat, EC Says 40% Axed Among 32 Lakh 'Adjudicated', Sorted In WB SIR
description: According to the office of the Chief Electoral Officer, West Bengal, around 32 lakh voters’ names have so far been sorted from the tally of 60.06 lakh logical discrepancy cases which have been pending ‘under adjudication' in the SIR.
